mapper.select: select date(create_time) as date, count(0) as count from tb_lend where is_delete = 0 and date(create_time) >= date_sub(now(), interval 7 day) group by date(create_time)
select book.book_name, count(0) as lend_count from tb_lend lend join tb_book book on lend.book_id = book.id where lend.is_delete = 0 group by lend.book_id order by lend_count desc limit 5

select book.id, book.book_name, author.author_name, book.cover_url, book.publish_date, count(0) as lend_count from tb_lend lend join tb_book book on lend.book_id = book.id join tb_author author on book.author_id = author.id where lend.is_delete = 0 group by book.id order by lend_count desc limit 3
select count(0) from tb_lend where is_delete = 0 and state = 2 and due_time < now()

select book.id, book.book_name, book.cover_url, author.author_name, publisher.publisher_name, lend.due_time as dueTime, lend.state from tb_lend lend join tb_book book on lend.book_id = book.id join tb_author author on book.author_id = author.id join tb_publisher publisher on book.publisher_id = publisher.id where lend.is_delete = 0 and lend.user_id = #{userId} and (lend.state=1 or lend.state=3) order by lend.create_time desc
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_lend SET state = 2 WHERE is_delete = 0 AND state = 1 AND NOW() > due_time;
